lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's that ladder next to the altar for?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Next to a Chaos Altar? That's a bit odd. Can I go down and have a look?

lines.speaker: Mage of Zamorak
lines.text: Well...I suppose. See, we found this ancient altar, but it was pretty broken so the Z.M.I. sent some of its researchers to try and repair it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How'd that work out for them?

lines.speaker: Mage of Zamorak
lines.text: Pretty well - only one died. Still, they got it working...sort of. This ancient technology can be tricky.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you mean, 'sort of'? Altars either work or don't work.

lines.speaker: Mage of Zamorak
lines.text: This one works, just not as you'd expect. You put pure essence in, but get random runes back. Some of them we don't even know how to craft!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds like a pretty good deal. Can I give it a go?

lines.speaker: Mage of Zamorak
lines.text: I don't think so. The mages don't like outsiders going in; they'll probably attack you. They only patrol the short path, though, so if you used the long path, through a tunnel near the entrance, you'd probably be safe.
